seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Custom router combining best LLMs per task (e.g., GPT 5.6 Sol for data analysis, Fable/Opus 4.8 for coding) usable in any harness like Abacus AI or Claude.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: GitHub repo redirects Claude Code to 10 free providers (Deepseek, Kimi etc.) for zero-cost execution; stable for 20k+ users, changes coding economics.
Repo with working code for 35 AI agent architectures (Reflexion, GraphRAG, MemGPT etc.); unified .run(task) interface, 17-task benchmark, supports 9 providers.
New SDK bundles CLI, AI skills, MCP servers and chain integrations for building autonomous onchain agents that research, transact and automate DeFi with sub-second settlement.
Local-first open-source second brain with MCP server allowing agents to directly read/write memory; paired with Conduit prompt-based agent framework.
